chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5908 of 2016 Dilshad Ahmed Saleem Versus Chief Secretary Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28737/16 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2016, which is over nine years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 06.08.2019, which is also over six years ago, no one was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. Since then no urgent application has been moved by learned counsel for the petitioner for hearing of the matter. Today once again none is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
